recommendation: Prioritize concrete service pilots over generic private document-assistant outbound. The strongest near-term wedges are AI receptionist/voice intake, meeting-to-action packets, workflow automation cleanup, inbox/document triage, and document packet generation. Treat trading as a paper-only sandbox and crypto/coin creation as non-primary.

opportunities.pain: Staff use AI but lose time reviewing, formatting, and correcting outputs.
opportunities.offer: Build and maintain repeatable AI workflows with human review checkpoints.
opportunities.risk: Scope creep if every workflow is custom.
opportunities.next_validation_step: Add a website section and one outreach variant focused on AI cleanup and workflow reliability.

opportunities.pain: Calls and meetings create notes, tasks, follow-ups, and docs manually.
opportunities.offer: Secure transcript intake, summary, action list, CRM/email draft, and document packet.
opportunities.next_validation_step: Build a demo using Chandru's recorded audio assets.

opportunities.pain: Missed calls, repetitive intake questions, and slow follow-up.
opportunities.offer: Inbound voice agent that captures caller details, qualifies need, and creates a review packet.
opportunities.risk: Live phone compliance, hallucination, and escalation failure.
opportunities.next_validation_step: Keep current voice agent dry-run and add a public demo before selling live calling.

opportunities.pain: Repetitive proposals, onboarding packets, checklists, and letters.
opportunities.offer: Upload notes/templates and generate consistent client-ready packets for review.
opportunities.risk: Template edge cases and legal/tax review boundaries.
opportunities.next_validation_step: Turn the document demo into two vertical-specific demos.

opportunities.pain: Shared inboxes receive attachments, requests, and noisy notifications.
opportunities.offer: Monitor inbox, classify messages, extract documents, create task queue, and draft responses.
opportunities.next_validation_step: Use JVT's mailbox listener as internal proof.

opportunities.target_customer: Privacy-sensitive professional teams with client documents
opportunities.pain: They want AI help but do not want sensitive files scattered across generic SaaS tools.
opportunities.offer: Deploy a private retrieval assistant and admin console on a Mac mini, mini-PC, or controlled cloud environment.
opportunities.risk: Support burden, hardware variability, and security expectations.
opportunities.next_validation_step: Package the M4 architecture as a case study after the control panel and outreach ops are stable.

reality_check.conclusion: The current outbound motion is not producing demand. The next metric should be real conversations and paid-pilot paths, not more generic sends.

sellable_wedge_backlog.target: Solo law, CPA, contractor, clinic, and home-service offices
sellable_wedge_backlog.first_proof_asset: Dry-run call to intake summary to follow-up packet
sellable_wedge_backlog.outreach_target: Owners or office managers with public phone-heavy service pages

sellable_wedge_backlog.first_proof_asset: Sample audio to transcript to decisions, tasks, and follow-up email
sellable_wedge_backlog.outreach_target: Operators who publish consultation or discovery-call offers
Owner/operators with visible lead forms and repetitive intake

sellable_wedge_backlog.target: Law, accounting, insurance, and property management offices

sellable_wedge_backlog.first_proof_asset: Intake notes to polished packet demo
sellable_wedge_backlog.outreach_target: Firms with onboarding, checklist, proposal, or packet workflows

non_primary_experiments.reason: Small account size cannot realistically reach $10k in one year without extreme risk.
guardrails: No order placement unless explicitly enabled for paper mode.
Require 60-90 days of logged paper results before considering live risk.

non_primary_experiments.status: Not recommended as a revenue line
non_primary_experiments.reason: Requires community, liquidity, trust, distribution, and legal/compliance review. Without those, it is speculation rather than a service business.

red_lines: No outbound AI calls without opt-in/compliance review.
No spending or provider signup without operator approval.
